text:
8 of the best Nintendo Switch 1 games to revisit on Switch 2

It’s no secret that brand-new games are taking longer and longer to develop – both because they’re becoming more ambitious and because they render in much higher resolutions, which warrants higher-quality assets. In between brand-new Nintendo Switch 2 releases, one of the console’s main draws is to replay Switch 1 games with higher frame rates, resolutions, or both. Of course,...
